pattern.imageEvidence: studio headshot session with photographer, client, lighting, and camera setup
pattern.styleContract: Polished and reassuring with prep proof, real studio headshot evidence, camera-blue action accents, and session usage cards as the signature move.

tagline: Headshots that look like you on a very good day.

hero.title: FrameForge headshot photography hero image
hero.alt: A photographer coaching a client during a professional headshot session with softbox lighting and camera setup.

contact.serviceArea: Professional headshots, brand photography, team portraits, LinkedIn refreshes, speaker images, website portraits, and studio or on-location sessions across the city

copy.eyebrow: Headshots and brand photos with prep built in
copy.heroText: FrameForge guides wardrobe, lighting, expression, usage needs, and delivery so your headshots feel current, credible, and still recognizably you.
copy.introTitle: The best headshot starts before you sit down.
copy.introText: We talk about industry, usage, background, wardrobe, retouch comfort, and whether you need one strong portrait or a small brand set.
copy.quoteTitle: Ready to book a headshot consult?
copy.quoteText: Send your role, usage needs, timeline, and any brand examples. We will recommend a session and prep path.

services.title: Individual Headshot
services.text: A guided session with lighting, posing, expression coaching, and a focused gallery for modern professional use.

services.title: Brand Mini Set
services.text: Headshots plus a few environmental or detail frames for websites, social profiles, and speaker pages.

services.title: Team Portrait Day
services.text: Consistent lighting, simple scheduling, and a clean handoff for small teams and offices.

process.title: Plan the use case
process.text: We ask where the photos will live, what tone they need, and what backgrounds make sense.

process.title: Prep the details
process.text: Wardrobe, grooming, glasses, retouch comfort, and arrival timing get handled before session day.

process.title: Choose and deliver
process.text: You select favorites with usage guidance, retouch notes, and clean export options.

proof.label: web, social, and print sizes available
